hero-title: New to all of this? You're in exactly the right place.
New to all this? Start right here.
New to all this? Start right here.
hero-lede: You don't need any background for this, and there's nothing you have to catch up on first. Each of the short reads below takes just one idea — what AI even is, what's behind the chatbots people use, what an “agent” really means, and how AI can help you do more rather than take your place — and explains it in plain, everyday words. Read them in whatever order you like. By the end you'll be ready to have a proper look around.

why-note: Wondering why we teach by letting you play with things and poke at them, instead of just lecturing at you? That idea isn't ours to take credit for — it comes from a handful of thoughtful people, and we name every one of them on the influences page.
